sourceAttribution: Derived from the tiny synthetic CT smoke fixture committed in this repository; single-lesion mask and mesh are deterministically carved from the largest connected component.

reportData.findings: Structured output contains 1 lesion component(s) derived from the lesion mask.
reportData.impression: 1 lesion component(s) were derived from seeded artifact masks and require clinical correlation.
reportData.limitations: Seeded demo import reuses artifact-backed findings and report sections; it does not represent a live ML execution. All outputs remain decision-support only and depend on artifact quality.
reportData.recommendation: Correlate with source images and radiologist review before clinical use.

reportText:
Findings: Structured output contains 1 lesion component(s) derived from the lesion mask.

Impression: 1 lesion component(s) were derived from seeded artifact masks and require clinical correlation.

Limitations: Seeded demo import reuses artifact-backed findings and report sections; it does not represent a live ML execution. All outputs remain decision-support only and depend on artifact quality.

Recommendation: Correlate with source images and radiologist review before clinical use.
